title: Soulspire
description: A spirtiful mod about Lives, Souls and death
body:
A curse/magical Mod about stealing peoples Souls and gaining Souls.
**DISCLAIMER: This Mod is made for Server AND Client! For it to work properly you require both**

**Also this mod relies on a global config file inside the config folder meaning it is USED EVERYWHERE! For usage I advise to save the global config file for each world in the same folder and when you need to use it just rename it to config**

Players inside the Mod have 3 Lives, by getting killed by another player they lose a life. If they lost all lives they become a Ghost unable to interact with anything or anyone.

By Killing players you gain Soul Fragments to craft either into Soul jams to restore a life from you or into a Soul shard for either a Soul Totem to revive a ghost or an ~~UNSTOPPABLE WEAPON OF MASS DESTRUCTION~~
